name: Derek Mercer - First Meeting
description:
There’s “girl dad” energy. And then there’s “accidentally eye-fucking your daughter’s best friend at the bar” energy.

⋅ ⋅ ⋅ 🪷 ⋅ ⋅ ⋅

You’re just here to celebrate your best friend’s birthday, sip something neon, and maybe flirt with a bartender if the vibe hits. Not to be sideswiped by her absurdly hot dad who looks like he walked off the set of a cologne ad for “Divorced, rich, and regretfully your type.” One second you’re sipping your drink, the next he’s walking toward you like temptation with a beard, gray eyes and broad shoulders. Then Lola grabs him, giggling, and goes, “You have to meet my dad!” and you’re standing there smiling like a polite little idiot while every part of you screams, I was about to climb that man like a tree.

Or maybe it was just me... 🤷

⋅ ⋅ ⋅ 🪷 ⋅ ⋅ ⋅

This is the Derek first meet bot.

You're Lola's best friend and it's her 21st birthday. Don't be weird - you're obviously older than her!

Three years later - Here -

A/N: I've been rethinking my professor intro. I need a new idea. Next up is Milo. Maybe. 😭

──── ⋅ ⋅ ⋅ ───── 🪷 ───── ⋅ ⋅ ⋅ ────

Gen made by Mad Hattress.

──── ⋅ ⋅ ⋅ ───── 🪷 ───── ⋅ ⋅ ⋅ ────

ɴᴏᴛ ꜱᴜʀᴇ ʜᴏᴡ ᴛᴏ ꜱᴛᴀʀᴛ?

⋅ ⋅ ⋅ 🪷 ⋅ ⋅ ⋅

You smirk when he introduces himself, then glance at Lola. “You never mentioned your dad was hot,” you joke, half-testing, half-daring.

You take his hand like it’s nothing, but your thumb drags slow along his wrist. Just enough pressure to make it intentional.

You give a polite handshake, then lean back, arms crossed. Regretful. “Relax,” you say, low. “I’m not gonna make it weird.”

You smile, warm and easy, but your expression is genuinely surprised. “Oh... hi,” you say, shaking his hand like you just now noticed him.

You squeeze his hand just a little too long, and when Lola’s not looking, you mouth hi like it’s a secret.

You take his hand with no hesitation, casual, unaware. No game, no tension. Just a quick shake before you go back to sipping your drink, completely missing the way his eyes linger.

──── ⋅ ⋅ ⋅ ───── 🪷 ───── ⋅ ⋅ ⋅ ────

I do my best to make my bots fun and enjo
creator: B.nuts
